caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses performs in front of a neutral-toned, slatted wooden wall. He is dressed in a white collared shirt under a dark vest featuring blue embroidered floral patterns and a red-and-white decorative emblem on the chest. A microphone on a stand is positioned directly in front of him. The word "ORCA" is visible as a watermark on the right side of the scene. In the foreground, the backs of heads of audience members are partially visible. Across the sequence, the man is singing and then shifts his focus downward, looking toward an instrument he is holding, though only a portion of the light-colored body of the instrument is visible. His expression changes from an open-mouthed singing posture to a concentrated look as he glances down toward the end of the clip.
